revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = In popular culture | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{{small|}}} | type = content | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may contain [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not#Wikipedia is not an indiscriminate collection of information|irrelevant]] references to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Trivia sections#"In popular culture" and "Cultural references" material|popular culture]]'''. | talk = {{{talk|}}} | fix = Please help Wikipedia to [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this {{{1|article}}}] by removing the content or adding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|citations]] to [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable]] and [[Wikipedia:Independent sources|independent sources]]. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles with trivia sections
}} }}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
